scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
    TRIM(record_id) AS registro_id,
    TRIM(patient_id) AS paciente_id,
    TRIM(patient_ci) AS ci_paciente,
    TRIM(patient_name) AS nombre_paciente,
    TRIM(patient_last_name_1) AS apellido_paterno,
    TRIM(patient_last_name_2) AS apellido_materno,
    TRIM(patient_sex) AS sexo,
    TRIM(patient_birth_date) AS fecha_nacimiento,
    TRIM(patient_municipality) AS municipio_residencia,
    TRIM(patient_community) AS comunidad_indigena,
    TRIM(vaccination_date) AS fecha_vacunacion,
    TRIM(vaccine_code) AS vacuna_id,
    TRIM(vaccine_name) AS vacuna_nombre,
    TRIM(dose_number) AS numero_dosis,
    TRIM(facility_code) AS establecimiento_id,
    TRIM(facility_name) AS nombre_establecimiento,
    TRIM(patient_department) AS departamento,
    TRIM(lot_number) AS lote_vacuna,
    TRIM(storage_temp_celsius) AS temperatura_conservacion,
    TRIM(patient_age_days) AS edad_dias_aplicacion,
    TRIM(administration_route) AS via_administracion
FROM bronze.vacunacion_rural_movil
WHERE record_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(record_id) <> ''',

query: 'SELECT 
    TRIM(id_registro) AS registro_id,
    TRIM(cod_paciente) AS paciente_id,
    TRIM(documento_identidad) AS ci_paciente,
    TRIM(nombres) AS nombre_paciente,
    TRIM(primer_apellido) AS apellido_paterno,
    TRIM(segundo_apellido) AS apellido_materno,
    TRIM(genero) AS sexo,
    TRIM(fec_nacimiento) AS fecha_nacimiento,
    TRIM(municipio) AS municipio_residencia,
    TRIM(pueblo_indigena) AS comunidad_indigena,
    TRIM(fec_vacunacion) AS fecha_vacunacion,
    TRIM(cod_vacuna) AS vacuna_id,
    TRIM(desc_vacuna) AS vacuna_nombre,
    TRIM(nro_dosis) AS numero_dosis,
    TRIM(cod_establecimiento) AS establecimiento_id,
    TRIM(desc_establecimiento) AS nombre_establecimiento,
    TRIM(depto) AS departamento,
    TRIM(nro_lote) AS lote_vacuna,
    TRIM(temp_conservacion) AS temperatura_conservacion,
    TRIM(edad_dias) AS edad_dias_aplicacion,
    TRIM(via_aplicacion) AS via_administracion
FROM bronze.vacunacion_la_paz
WHERE id_registro IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(id_registro) <> ''',

query: 'SELECT 
    TRIM(registro_id) AS registro_id,
    TRIM(paciente_id) AS paciente_id,
    TRIM(ci_paciente) AS ci_paciente,
    TRIM(nombre_paciente) AS nombre_paciente,
    TRIM(apellido_paterno) AS apellido_paterno,
    TRIM(apellido_materno) AS apellido_materno,
    TRIM(sexo) AS sexo,
    TRIM(fecha_nacimiento) AS fecha_nacimiento,
    TRIM(municipio_residencia) AS municipio_residencia,
    TRIM(comunidad_indigena) AS comunidad_indigena,
    TRIM(fecha_vacunacion) AS fecha_vacunacion,
    TRIM(vacuna_id) AS vacuna_id,
    TRIM(vacuna_nombre) AS vacuna_nombre,
    TRIM(numero_dosis) AS numero_dosis,
    TRIM(establecimiento_id) AS establecimiento_id,
    TRIM(nombre_establecimiento) AS nombre_establecimiento,
    TRIM(departamento) AS departamento,
    TRIM(lote_vacuna) AS lote_vacuna,
    TRIM(temperatura_conservacion) AS temperatura_conservacion,
    TRIM(edad_dias_aplicacion) AS edad_dias_aplicacion,
    TRIM(aplicacion_oportuna) AS aplicacion_oportuna,
    TRIM(via_administracion) AS via_administracion
FROM bronze.vacunacion_santa_cruz
WHERE registro_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(registro_id) <> ''',
